name: type_mismatch
description: Comparing str to int causes TypeError in is_valid_total()

name: null_reference
description: get_and_format_name() calls .upper() on None, causing AttributeError

name: off_by_one
description: get_slice() uses count-1 instead of count, returning one fewer item

name: wrong_return_value
description: apply_bulk_discount() uses > instead of >=, missing threshold orders

name: import_error
description: parser.py imports from non-existent formatter module
